task_completion.description: Log in to Odoo using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo login screen with 'admin' entered, followed by the main Odoo app dashboard being visible.
The Quality app dashboard or menu is visible, indicated by 'Quality' in the top navigation bar.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Quality Alert Stages configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Quality Alert Stages' list view is visible, typically accessed via Configuration -> Quality Alert Stages.
The form view for the Quality Alert Stage named 'Done' is open.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Folded in Kanban' setting for the 'Done' stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox next to 'Folded in Kanban' (or similar fold setting) is checked/toggled on in the form view.

task_completion.description: Save the changes or verify the stage is folded in the Kanban view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Saved' indicator (cloud icon with a checkmark in Odoo 17) is visible on the form view, OR the Quality Alerts Kanban view is shown with the 'Done' column collapsed/folded.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard browser interaction with the Odoo UI, without terminal windows, python scripts, or direct database manipulation tools open.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser UI elements (address bar, tabs) are visible and show the local Odoo instance URL, rather than a text editor or mocked interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open to artificially modify the DOM to show the checkbox as checked.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Quality Alert Stage to modify is exactly named 'Done'. The expected final state is that the 'Folded in Kanban' (or 'fold') setting is enabled (True) for this specific stage. Success requires this checkbox to be checked and saved in the Odoo database.
